articles.headline: Kane eyes Lewandowski record: Tracking Europe's major goal, assist records
articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

images.name: Harry Kane [1296x729]
images.caption: Kane scored his 20th Bundesliga goal of the season today after just 16 games.
images.credit: Photo by Tom Weller/picture alliance via Getty Images

images.name: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes [1296x729]
images.caption: Bruno Fernandes' assist tally took a sizeable leap after Ruben Amorim was sacked as Manchester United manager.

images.name: Lamine Yamal, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Neither Kylian Mbappé nor Lamine Yamal are likely to break Lionel Messi's single-season goal and assist marks in LaLiga.

images.name: Inter Milan's Lautaro Martinez [1296x729]
images.caption: Lautaro Martinez easily leads the Seire A scoring chart, but he won't get near the single-season record.

images.name: Mason Greenwood aug 2025 [1296x729]
images.caption: Mason Greenwood was made to share the Ligue 1 top scorer title last season.

images.name: Vinicus Junior, Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappé is within reach of Cristiano Ronaldo's single-season Champions League goal record.
images.credit: David S. Bustamante/Real Madrid via Getty Images

images.name: Bayern Munich holds on for 3-2 win
images.caption: Harry Kane scores a brace as Bayern Munich beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-2.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Man United keeping tabs on Stuttgart's Andrés
articles.description: Manchester United could look to the Bundesliga for their newest midfield signing. Transfer Talk has the latest.

images.name: Chema Andrés [1296x729]
images.credit: (Photo by Harry Langer/picture alliance via Getty Images)

images.name: Is Lamine Yamal the best player in the world?
images.caption: The 'ESPN FC' crew react to Lamine Yamal becoming the youngest player to score a LaLiga hat-trick this century as Barcelona beat Villarreal 4-1.

articles.headline: Arsenal win ugly vs. Chelsea; Bayern close in on Bundesliga title; more
articles.description: Arsenal muscled past Chelsea on Sunday, but coach Mikel Arteta can't be happy at how difficult things look for his team. Also: Bayern Munich likely wrapped up the Bundesliga with a Der Klassiker win.

images.name: Arsenal celeb v Chelsea 260302 [1296x729]
images.credit: Stuart MacFarlane/Arsenal FC via Getty Images

images.name: Can Arsenal ride set-pieces all the way to the title?
images.caption: Shaka Hislop and Steve Nicol wonder if Arsenal are too reliant on set-pieces to win the Premier League title.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, SV Werder Bremen 0. Victor Boniface (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Amine Adli (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, SV Werder Bremen 0.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Florian Wirtz replaces Amine Adli.
Second Half begins Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, SV Werder Bremen 0.
Leonardo Bittencourt (SV Werder Bremen) is shown the yellow card.
Piero Hincapié (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 2, SV Werder Bremen 0. Granit Xhaka (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Victor Boniface.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Patrik Schick replaces Victor Boniface.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Jeremie Frimpong replaces Nathan Tella.
Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 3, SV Werder Bremen 0. Florian Wirtz (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Robert Andrich.
Substitution, SV Werder Bremen. Olivier Deman replaces Felix Agu.
Substitution, SV Werder Bremen. Dawid Kownacki replaces Nick Woltemade.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Álex Grimaldo replaces Piero Hincapié.
Substitution, SV Werder Bremen. Isak Hansen-Aaröen replaces Leonardo Bittencourt because of an injury.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Exequiel Palacios replaces Granit Xhaka.

Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 4, SV Werder Bremen 0. Florian Wirtz (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Exequiel Palacios with a through ball   following a fast break.

Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 5, SV Werder Bremen 0. Florian Wirtz (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Álex Grimaldo   following a fast break.
Second Half ends, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 5, SV Werder Bremen 0.

article.story:
Undefeated Bayer Leverkusen secured their first Bundesliga title on Sunday with a 5-0 victory over Werder Bremen, breaking an 11-year stranglehold on the league by Bayern Munich.

Xabi Alonso's team, who have now gone a league-record 29 matches without defeat this season to secure their first trophy since 1993, have a 16-point lead over Bayern with five matches remaining.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Leverkusen left nothing to chance and sealed their title win at the first opportunity with Florian Wirtz bagging a hat-trick in a win that stretched their unbeaten run across all competitions to a remarkable 43 games this season.

They earned a 24th minute penalty and Victor Boniface, who only recently came back after a three-month injury break, stepped up to score his first league goal since December and his 11th of the campaign.

There were more chances to double their lead in a one-sided first half, with Amine Adli also hitting the woodwork for the hosts.

Werder came out fighting after the break, trying to spoil the party, but Granit Xhaka's missile on the hour from 25 metres out sparked wild celebrations in the stands.

They were not yet done with substitute Wirtz adding another eight minutes later.

The Germany international, gearing up for Euro 2024 on home soil in June, bagged another in the 83rd with impatient fans then briefly running onto the pitch. He completed his hat trick in the 90th to cap his team's five-star performance and secure the title in style.
